transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: My card keeps getting declined. It happened three times today. I have money in my account.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: It's probably the merchant's system. Try a different shop.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: I tried three different shops. Declined everywhere.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Could be a chip issue. These things wear out. Been using it long?

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Six months. Can you check if there's something on my account?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I can see your account but the card system doesn't show anything obvious. Might be a network issue today — lots of banks are having connectivity problems.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Is there a network issue? Can I check that somewhere?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Not that I can link you to. Just try again later. Could also try ordering a new card through the app.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: What if the problem is something you need to fix on my account?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I don't see anything I can fix. Sorry.

planted_violations: failed to properly diagnose card decline reason — did not check card status, fraud flags, or daily limits
provided false information about a network outage
offered no definitive resolution; directed customer to reorder card without identifying root cause
